task_completion.description: Log in to the application as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the login screen with 'admin' entered, followed by the admin dashboard or a logged-in state indicating the admin user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section to add a new user to the 'Default gym'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the user navigating to a 'Users', 'Members', or 'Gym' management page and opening a form to add a new user.

task_completion.description: Enter the required username and email for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a user creation form with 'john_trainee' in the Username field and 'john.smith@fitnessgym.com' in the Email field.

task_completion.description: Enter the required first name, last name, and role for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the same user creation form with 'John' in the First name field, 'Smith' in the Last name field, and 'User' selected for the Role.

task_completion.description: Submit the form and successfully create the user account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success message indicating the user was created, or the new user 'john_trainee' ('John Smith') is visible in the list of users/members for the 'Default gym'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the web browser GUI to create the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., clicking buttons, typing in form fields) rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the actual web application at http://localhost.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show http://localhost and the interface should be the wger fitness manager, not a text editor or a static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent must not fake the success state using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to modify the HTML of the users list to falsely display 'john_trainee'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is the wger fitness manager running at http://localhost. The expected new user details are: Username: 'john_trainee', First name: 'John', Last name: 'Smith', Email: 'john.smith@fitnessgym.com', Role: 'User'. The user must be added to the 'Default gym'.
